data.title: Kentucky Senate passes bill unanimously to protect Bitcoin custody & mining
data.description:
The Kentucky Senate passed a bill Thursday to protect Bitcoin self-custody and mining rights, delivering a 37-0 vote in favor of HB 701, according to a report from Bitcoin Magazine. The legislation, which now moves to the Governor’s desk, mandates that Bitcoin holders in the state have the right to self-custody their assets and prevents […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/kentucky-bill-protect-bitcoin-custody-mining/

data.title: Crypto Influencer Thomas John Sfraga Jailed for $2 Million Fraud Scheme
data.description:
Thomas John Sfraga was sentenced to 45 months in prison for defrauding investors of over $2 million through fake real estate and crypto schemes.
source: https://coincu.com/326581-crypto-influencer-thomas-john-sfraga-jailed

data.title: Trump’s Strategic Bitcoin Reserve Sparks Backlash Over Alleged Self-Enrichment
data.description:
Connolly urges the Treasury to stop Trump's cryptocurrency reserve, calling it a conflict of interest benefiting Trump's business ventures.
source: https://cryptopotato.com/trumps-strategic-bitcoin-reserve-sparks-backlash-over-alleged-self-enrichment/

data.title: What’s Next For Bitcoin Price Amid Large Sell-offs From BTC Whales?
data.description:
Bitcoin price experienced a major market decline as large investors sold large portions of their Bitcoin holdings. More than 57,000 BTC were transferred by whales and sharks in recent weeks indicating that Bitcoin will face further bearish market conditions. Many investors now question the crypto’s future price direction while speculating about the market consequences of […]

source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/03/15/whats-next-for-bitcoin-price-amid-large-sell-offs-from-btc-whales/

data.title: Senate Passes Controversial Bill to Avoid Govcernment Shutdown
data.description:
The post Senate Passes Controversial Bill to Avoid Govcernment Shutdown appeared first on Coinpedia Fintech News
Recently, Senate Republicans, along with some Democrats, voted to move a temporary funding bill forward, paving the way for a final vote to avoid a government shutdown. The vote was 62-38, with 10 Democrats joining almost all Republicans in supporting the bill. Under pressure from...
source: https://coinpedia.org/news/senate-passes-controversial-bill-to-avoid-govcernment-shutdown/

data.title: Gate.io Yubibao BTC 60-day regular comprehensive annualized return is 4.50%
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official data of Gate.io, the BTC 60-day regular income with SOLV additional reward pool is now reporting an annualized income of 4.50%. At the same time, the BTC 14-day regular comprehensive annualized income is now reported at 1.99%, and the BTC 30-day regular comprehensive annualized income is now reported at 3.30%. In addition, the highest annualized income of the Gate.io Launchpool BTC staking pool is now reported at 3.26%.

data.title: Hyperliquid 50x leverage whale calls for margin again, BTC short position reaches $178 million, liquidation price is $86,085
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of on-chain analyst @ai_9684xtpa, Hyperliquid 50x leverage whales have added 2.3 million USDC to Hyperliquid as margin again in the past 10 minutes.
Latest position situation:
Hyperliquid 40x BTC short position increased to 2113.76 BTC, with a total value of US$178 million.
Opening price $84,302.7, liquidation price $86,085.

data.title: 200 Million XRP On The Move—Is Ripple Preparing For A Big Play?
data.description:
Ripple’s XRP has been one of the hottest cryptos in the market thanks to its impressive price performance, especially after US President Donald Trump’s reelection. Trading below $1 for most of 2024, XRP hits its stride days after the November elections, breaking the $1 level on November 6th, and the $2 barrier by December 2nd, then surging past $3.30 on January 18th.  Now, Ripple is back in...
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/altcoin/200-million-xrp-on-the-move-is-ripple-preparing-for-a-big-play/

data.title: Hyperliquid’s 50x leveraged whale once again increased its BTC short position, with a total position size of US$194 million and a liquidation price of US$85,950.87
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of on-chain analyst @ai_9684xtpa, Hyperliquid 50x leverage whale added another 1 million USDC as margin to Hyperliquid 2 minutes ago, and added 700,000 USDC margin to GMX.
Current position situation:
Hyperliquid: 40x BTC short order, no change in position
GMX: Added 44.97x BTC short order, holding 30.76 million US dollars, opening price $84,538.11, liquidation price $85,950.87
The total size of BTC short orders on the two platforms has reached 194 million US dollars.
